text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper with this exact title is real and was published at MICCAI 2023 (not NeurIPS 2023). The cited authors (H. Wang, X. Li, Q. Zhang) are completely fabricated — the actual authors are Hu Wang, Congbo Ma, Jianpeng Zhang, Yuan Zhang, Jodie Avery, Louise Hull, and Gustavo Carneiro, with none of the cited authors matching the real ones.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.01035
